World Preview takes you inside Port Desire, the dense cybergrunge city of NO LAW. Get a close look at the cluttered markets, lived-in apartments, and neon-soaked streets, and see how dynamic lighting, crowds, and systemic destruction come together to make a world that reacts and changes around your actions.

text:
Planet Zoo 2 - Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
Pre-order now: https://store.playstation.com/product/EP2377-PPSA29934_00-PLANETZOO2000000

Build a wilder world in Planet Zoo 2. Create distinctive zoos around the globe filled with awe-inspiring animals, including fully aquatic and flying species, before taking your experience beyond the zoo to release your animals into expansive Wildlife Reserves.

Coming 13 October 2026!

#ps5 #ps5games #planetzoo #planetzoo2

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Forever Ago - Release Date Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist today: https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018129/

Forever Ago is coming October 8, 2026 to PlayStation 5.

Following a tragic stroke of fate, Alfred embarks on a journey north in search of redemption. In this single-player road trip adventure, you'll travel to beautiful places, capture memories with your camera, meet interesting characters, and even make some new friends.

Discover Stories 
Experience a nuanced and heartfelt story about broken dreams, loss, and regret—but also courage, hope, and true friendship. Learn about the stories, beliefs and struggles of characters you meet along the way, brought to life by renowned voice actors.

Embark on an Unforgettable Road Trip
Explore beautiful environments, ranging from serene forest trails to dusty barrens sweltering in the desert sun. Examine and interact with objects to learn about your surroundings and the people living there. And don’t forget to pet the dog.

Capture Memories
Take pictures with Alfred’s good ol' instant camera to document your journey and solve small environmental puzzles. 

Relive True Love
Play through a lifetime of love as Alfred with your sweetheart Audrey, experiencing a true love that transcends time. Featuring an original soundtrack by Clark Aboud (Slay the Spire, Kind Words).

© 2026 Developed by Third Shift. Published by Annapurna Interactive. All rights reserved.

#ps5 #ps5games

https://store.playstation.com/concept/10014397

Get ready to conquer the Deep North! The Viking action adventure hit Valheim leaves Early Access and arrives to PlayStation 5 on September 9. Play alone or with your friends, and prove yourself worthy in the eyes of Odin!

Serious Sam: Shatterverse - Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10009253

Serious Sam: Shatterverse is a co-op roguelite FPS for 1 - 5 players. Blast through shifting universes, stack wild boons, bend the rules with run modifiers, and hunt Mental's deadliest forces. Fall fast. Come back louder.

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Control Resonant - Take Control Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/control-resonant/

Video Title (Consumer Facing):
Control Resonant - Take CONTROL Trailer | PS5 Games

Video Description (Consumer Facing):
Wield the Aberrant. Stop the Hiss. Rediscover your humanity. Take control.

After years of imprisonment at the hands of the Federal Bureau of Control, Dylan Faden is free on the streets of Manhattan. But the city is overrun by otherworldly forces and at the peak of a paranatural crisis, and Dylan needs to contain and comprehend the dangers he is now facing. His sister, Bureau Director Jesse Faden, is missing. He has to find her and reckon with the world around him.

CONTROL Resonant arrives September 24th 2026 to PlayStation 5. Pre-order now!

May contain content inappropriate for children. Visit www.esrb.org for rating information.

#ps5 #ps5games #controlresonant

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Terrinoth: Heroes of Descent - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017368/

The legendary board game series is available now on PS5!

Dark forces are drawn to the lands of Terrinoth. Yet somewhere lies a forgotten relic that could turn the tides. Such power cannot fall into the wrong hands, lest the fate of the world plunge into unending darkness.

Form your company of ragtag adventurers, journey into the perilous dungeons of Terrinoth, face the mysterious upheaval of an occult master and unfold a fully original storyline set one year before the events of Descent: Legends of the Dark.

⚔️ Master your Heroes: Choose from 8 signature adventurers each with their own background and combat style. Hone your skills and perks through leveling; upgrade your equipment at the Forge; and become an undefeated company of heroes.

⚔️ Authentic dungeon crawler: Explore 20 massive dungeons with unique environments and full-voiced storylines. Meet characters with dynamic dialogues that adapt to your party and complete side quests with narrative highlights.

⚔️ Accessible Turn-Based Combat: Tactical combat without steep learning curves or complex rule books! Use positioning, elevation, line of sight and timing to your advantage against cunning foes and ruthless bosses. Unleash multi-character combos and finish ‘em with devastating Synergy attacks. 

⚔️ Full Campaign, One-Night Missions: Unfold an epic story-driven campaign spanning through four themed Chapters split in multiple self-contained Missions. Each can be completed in a one-night session and offer a unique, replayable experience. Perfect for game night!

⚔️ Play Solo or Co-Op up to 4 players Online: Face the forces of darkness alone, or team up with your friends online, with full controller support included. They can even join mid-dungeon.

#ps5 #ps5games

https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10017555

"This is it, Warrior. Wake up."

Battle demonic creatures and master fast-paced combat in the apocalyptic ruins of Paris. The veil is broken, and you are humanity's last hope.

Armatus launches this winter on PS5 - wishlist now.

text:
About Fishing - Plot Thickens Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016151

Mystery Fishing Game

Cast your line into calm waters and feel the quiet pull beneath the surface. Each cast brings rewards, but some things you reel in were never meant to be found. About Fishing is a fishing mystery game that blends the calm, meditative rhythm of fishing with the quiet tension of discovery.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Remothered: Red Nun's Legacy - Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018448

Here’s your first look at the gameplay of Remothered: Red Nun’s Legacy, the latest chapter in the iconic survival horror saga.

Play as Susan, driven by a mother's desperate love.

Face murderous stalkers, hide, evade, and fight back only when necessary. 

But survival isn’t just about escaping; master hypnosis powers to uncover forgotten memories, reveal hidden paths and reshape the environment itself.

Remothered: Red Nun’s Legacy launches later this year.

Wishlist now. Escape later.

#ps5 #ps5games #remothered

Jump back into the world of beasts in Cassette Beasts 2002, coming to PlayStation 5! #ps5 #ps5games #cassettebeasts

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Rivage - Release Date Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017506/

Rivage is coming to PlayStation 5 on August 13th, 2026.  

Rivage is a first-person sci-fi puzzle adventure set aboard the A.R.E.S. space station, trapped in a mysterious space phenomenon. 

You play as Miranda, a researcher stuck in an infinite time loop. Your crew has vanished, only their journals, recordings, and personal belongings remain. Explore the station to solve puzzles and piece together what happened. 

Expect intricate logic puzzles, locked doors that won't open on the first try, and strange phenomenon onboard. 

Developed by Exnilo Studio 

Published by Raw Fury 

#ps5 #ps5games

text:

https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10013733/

Adrenaline-Fueled Roguelite FPS. Fight relentless machines driven by a hostile AI. Escape an endless cycle. Craft infinite weapon variants with deep gun modding. Forge deadly synergies. Carve your way out through enviro destruction. /BREAK THE SYSTEM /BREAK THE SEQUENCE /BREAK FREE

VOID/BREAKER releases on PS5 in 2026.

Announcing Senua, a new action-adventure set in the Hellblade universe. Senua, a Celtic warrior, is trapped between life and death in a fractured vision of purgatory. Coming 2027 to PlayStation®5.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
DOOM: The Dark Ages - Revelations - Official Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/doom-the-dark-ages/

HELL FREEZES OVER in DOOM: The Dark Ages | Revelations, an all-new campaign expansion that unleashes a brutal new chapter of the Slayer’s saga. 
 
Wounded and betrayed, the Slayer is thrust into a merciless purgatory only escapable by confronting haunting truths and forging new strength with the help of a mysterious ally. He must ascend from the prison of his mind and fight an abomination of the gods to set his followers on the path to freedom. 
 
Featuring new levels with deeper puzzles, new demons, and new mysteries, Revelations opens up a whole new dimension of combat. The all-new deadly Chain Spear offers returning slayers a uniquely satisfying combat system – one that rewards mastery with enhanced power and mobility. 
 
Also included is the highly anticipated Ripatorium 3.0, adding DLC content (3 new maps, new demons, and fully upgraded new weapons) plus deeper customization, improved pass code generation, and saving + loading personal presets. 

Available July 7,2026*.

For more information on all things DOOM: The Dark Ages and id Software, follow these channels and join the Slayers Club.   

* DLC to be released July 7. July 8 in UTC + 7 and higher time zones

#ps5 #ps5games #doom 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Chronoscript: The Endless End - Prologue Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016840/
Scheduled for release in Fall 2026!

"Chronoscript: The Endless End" is a 2D exploration action-adventure game.
This trailer marks the world premiere of the character designs for the mysterious writer and the protagonist (the editor), as well as a brand-new stage, Ancient Egypt.

The world of "Chronoscript: The Endless End" is brought to life by 3D character designs by Mari Shimazaki. The music and sound effects are created by Yasunori Mitsuda and other members of PROCYON STUDIO, with Manami Kiyota participating as a guest composer!

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Grounded 2 - PlayStation Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
Grounded 2 launches on PlayStation 5 on August 11, bringing an entirely new community of players into the park as we continue growing the game throughout our early access development period.
Since day one, Grounded has been built alongside its community. Some of the biggest features, improvements, and changes in the original game came directly from player feedback, and that's something we've carried forward into Grounded 2.

Whether you're stepping into the park for the first time or you've already been surviving your way through Brookhollow Park, August 11 is shaping up to be a big day.

#ps5 #ps5games #summergamefest2026 #grounded2

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Spyro: A Realm Beyond - Cinematic Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
Take flight in a brand-new journey through a strange and wondrous realm. When Spyro finds himself stranded, his journey to discover a way home is interrupted by the arrival of a vicious invading force known as the Scavs. 

Spyro must make new allies and rise to protect this realm before it’s changed forever. Feel the freedom of flight as you soar above vibrant landscapes, weave between treetops, dive off massive landmarks and wing your way through this new realm in Spyro ’s boldest evolution yet. Carve your path through the skies and chain together dives, climbs and tight turns as you navigate the world your way. 

Crafted by Toys For Bob, this is a new evolution of Spyro, built to send the purple dragon soaring higher than ever before. 

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved - Cinematic Story Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/halo-campaign-evolved/

After crash landing on a mysterious ringworld known as Halo, the Master Chief is tasked with defending humanity against an overwhelming alien force: the Covenant. With the help of his AI companion Cortana, the Chief must uncover Halo’s dark secrets and fight to avert the annihilation of all life in the galaxy. 

Halo: Campaign Evolved is coming to PlayStation 5 on July 28. Pre-order the Premium Edition or Collector’s Edition today and get up to 5 days early access beginning July 23, 2026. 

#ps5 #ps5games #halo #halocampaignevolved 

Rated Mature
